project.name: itsdangerous
project.description: Safely pass data to untrusted environments and back. Provides cryptographic signing and serialization for data that needs to round-trip through untrusted contexts (URLs, cookies, etc.).

nodes.name: __init__.py
nodes.summary: Public API surface: re-exports BadData/BadSignature/Signer/Serializer/TimestampSigner/URLSafeSerializer family for the itsdangerous package.

nodes.name: _json.py
nodes.summary: Internal _CompactJSON helper that wraps json.dumps with separators=(",",":") for compact output.

nodes.name: encoding.py
nodes.summary: Pure helpers: want_bytes coercion, urlsafe base64 encode/decode, int-to-bytes and bytes-to-int converters used by signing/serialization.

nodes.name: exc.py
nodes.summary: Exception hierarchy rooted at BadData. BadSignature/BadTimeSignature/SignatureExpired/BadHeader/BadPayload carry payload context for failed verification.

nodes.name: serializer.py
nodes.summary: Serializer class composes a Signer with a serializer module (default json) to produce signed payloads. Implements dumps/loads, dumps_to_fobj/loads_from_fobj, and the _PDataSerializer Protocol the constructor accepts.

nodes.name: signer.py
nodes.summary: Signing primitives: SigningAlgorithm Protocol, NoneAlgorithm (no-op), HMACAlgorithm (HMAC-SHA1 default), and Signer class that derives keys, computes/verifies signatures, separates value from signature with sep.

nodes.name: timed.py
nodes.summary: TimestampSigner adds a base64 timestamp to the signed payload; TimedSerializer composes it with Serializer and enforces max_age on load.

nodes.name: url_safe.py
nodes.summary: URLSafeSerializerMixin: zlib-compresses payload (when shorter) and uses urlsafe base64 + _CompactJSON to keep signed strings URL-safe. URLSafeSerializer/URLSafeTimedSerializer concrete classes.

nodes.name: test_signer.py
nodes.summary: Tests for Signer / signing algorithms in src/itsdangerous/signer.py.

nodes.name: test_timed.py
nodes.summary: Tests for TimestampSigner / TimedSerializer (uses freezegun for time mocking).

nodes.name: .pre-commit-config.yaml
nodes.summary: Pre-commit hooks: ruff lint/format on commit.

nodes.name: .readthedocs.yaml
nodes.summary: Read the Docs build configuration (sphinx, python 3.13).

nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Project overview and quickstart example using URLSafeSerializer.

nodes.name: pyproject.toml
nodes.summary: Package manifest: name=itsdangerous, version=2.3.0.dev, BSD-3-Clause; declares dev/docs/tests/typing dependency groups, ruff/pytest config.

nodes.name: on-create-command.sh
nodes.summary: Devcontainer bootstrap: installs project + uv dependencies.

nodes.name: pull_request_template.md
nodes.summary: PR description template enforcing fixes/changelog/tests checklist.

nodes.name: test_encoding.py
nodes.summary: Tests for encoding helpers in src/itsdangerous/encoding.py.

layers.name: Core Library
layers.description: The itsdangerous Python package: signing, serialization, encoding, exceptions, and URL-safe variants.

layers.name: Public API
layers.description: Top-level re-exports that form the package surface (src/itsdangerous/__init__.py).

layers.name: Tests
layers.description: pytest suite covering encoding, signer, serializer, timed, and url_safe modules.

layers.name: Documentation
layers.description: Sphinx documentation sources and configuration in docs/.

layers.name: Project Configuration
layers.description: Build/test/lint/editor configuration at the repo root (pyproject.toml, ruff, pre-commit, editorconfig, gitignore, lockfile, license, readme).

layers.name: CI / Dev Environment
layers.description: GitHub workflows, PR/issue templates, devcontainer for codespaces, Read the Docs build config.

tour.title: Project Overview
tour.description: Start with the README and license to understand what itsdangerous solves: cryptographic signing/serialization for data round-tripping through untrusted contexts.

tour.title: Public API surface
tour.description: The package __init__ re-exports the user-facing classes (Serializer, Signer, TimestampSigner, URLSafeSerializer, URLSafeTimedSerializer, and the BadData exception family).

tour.title: Encoding primitives
tour.description: Pure helpers used everywhere downstream: urlsafe base64 encode/decode, int-to-bytes conversion, want_bytes coercion.

tour.title: Signing core
tour.description: SigningAlgorithm Protocol, HMACAlgorithm (default), and Signer that ties keys, separators, and algorithm together for sign/verify.

tour.title: Serialization layer
tour.description: Serializer composes a Signer with a serialization module (default json) to dumps/loads complex payloads as signed strings.

tour.title: Time-bounded variants
tour.description: TimestampSigner prepends a base64 timestamp; TimedSerializer wraps that into a serializer with max_age expiration.

tour.title: URL-safe variants
tour.description: URLSafeSerializerMixin uses zlib compression + urlsafe base64 + _CompactJSON to keep signed strings safe for URLs/cookies.

tour.title: Exception model
tour.description: BadData rooted hierarchy: BadSignature, BadTimeSignature, SignatureExpired, BadHeader, BadPayload — all carry attribution data for failed verification.

tour.title: Tests
tour.description: pytest suite mirroring each src module (encoding, signer, serializer, timed, url_safe). Uses freezegun for time-based assertions.

tour.title: Documentation & release infra
tour.description: Sphinx docs (concepts, signer, serializer, timed, url_safe, encoding), changelog, devcontainer, GitHub workflows.
